content:
Bank Statement Summary — VedaCorp Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (SBIN A/C: 7890123456)

- Total inflows: ₹182.4 crore (reported revenue)
- Actual verified client payments: ₹126.8 crore (from 3 existing clients: TechNova Dubai, InfraSoft Singapore, DataCore Bengaluru)
- Suspicious outflows:
  - ₹4.2 crore to Sparrow Holdings (Feb 15, 2022)
  - ₹7.5 crore to Vireo Ventures (Jul 12, 2022)
  - ₹6.0 crore to Goa property via Mauritius (Aug 15, 2022)
- Total siphoned: ₹18.7 crore

Revenue recognition: 47% increase attributed to 12 new enterprise clients — but CRM shows 0 new clients added in FY2022. All 'new client' entries were backdated from FY2021. Invoices were issued in bulk on Dec 31, 2021, for services rendered 'in FY2022' — a clear violation of Ind AS 18.

Conclusion: Revenue was artificially inflated. Asset stripping occurred through fake consultancy invoices and circular fund transfers.
